caption.text:
Everything is hard! That’s just the way it is. 
God willing; everyday you have a chance to choose your hard. Why choose the hard that won’t get you anywhere. 
Do something about that TODAY!!! 
I want everybody to win!! 🫡💪🏾

#motivation #fitnessaddict #lifestyle #runners #loveyourself

caption.text:
Tight hips will cause all kinds of problems if you don’t get a hold of it NOW!! Back pain, knee pain, poor posture, list goes on! 
Try a few of these hip flexor exercises and stretches to relieve discomfort and regain hip mobility! 🫡💪🏾

#hipmobility #hipmobilityexercises #healtychoices #fitnessmotivation #flexibility

caption.text:
Ayyee Happy Birthday Sly!!! 🎉🥳 I bet you turnt up huh??

Sure did. Turnt up with running my very first 5k Race 🏃🏾‍♂️🥇☘️

Pot of Gold 5K Race ~ Knightdale NC

I can’t explain it but I was just like majority of people who said I would never just run for the fun of it. I get it. But it just came to me all of a sudden out of nowhere and I quickly fell in love with it. 

Don’t be afraid to step out that comfort zone. I know it’s cozy there but it’s time to get out. 🫡

Next race in 2 weeks. 🫡💪🏾

#barber #running #5krace #healthy #runningmotivation

caption.text:
✨ 2026 HEBS Educator ✨
Meet Sly Brooks @slysfirecutz — talented barber and educator bringing hands-on experience and precision cutting techniques to the HEBS stage. 💈🔥

In Shear & Clipper Combo Mastery, Sly will show how effectively combining shears and clippers can improve speed, control, and overall cutting results. This session highlights practical techniques for creating seamless blends, sharper finishes, and more refined styles behind the chair.

Barbers and stylists will walk away with a better understanding of how to use both tools strategically to enhance their workflow and elevate the quality of their haircuts.

If you’re ready to refine your technique and take your cutting skills to the next level, this is a class you won’t want to miss. ✂️🔥

📅 May 4th
⏰ 12:00 PM
📍 Room E
🎤 Educator Sly Brooks

Come ready to learn, grow, and level up your craft at the Hair Education Beauty Summit. ✨

🎟️ Tickets available now — link in bio

#HEBS2026 #HEBS #BarberEducation #HairEducation #BarberClass BeautyEducation

caption.text:
Do what you want but unless you are going for your pro card; train to be able to do functional movements at a high level daily 💪🏾

#dailyreminder #fitness #hyrox #lifestyle #healtylifestyle

caption.text:
Let’s normalize recomping our bodies and changing our lives! 
You have to be tired of that gut by now. 
There is no way you are ok with being tired just walking up a flight of stairs. 
There is no way you are cool with the back pain, aches, fatigue! 
And please don’t tell me you still think it’s cool to go out all night, drink, smoke hookah and stare at peoples outfit all night. 
Please tell me your are past that 🤷🏾‍♂️

Let’s get moving good people. 

This is the norm! 💪🏾💪🏾🙏🏽

#fitness #healthychoices #lifestyle #loveyourself #explorepage✨

caption.text:
A honest days work!! 💈💈

My @andisclippers tools get me though the longest days at the shop! Constant power and efficiency throughout every cut. 🔥🔥🔥

My @blessedcapes are clutch. Super breathable and a lot of coverage, keeping my clients clean and free from cut hair. 🔥🔥🔥

original_sound_info.original_audio_title: Mix: The Hit Crew • Do For Love (Instrumental) | Common • GO! (Instrumental)

caption.text:
- You can work “every” day of your life if you want to. 
- You can stick around in that relationship “hoping” they will change if you want to. 
- You can keep logging onto social media, “wishing” you was doing all the things you see other people doing! 
- You can keep “complaining” about wanting to get into shape and still complaining about how hard it is. 

Stop saying you can’t do something. 
Go do it!!
Book that flight. 
Buy that house. 
Get married. 
Have kids. 
Travel the world. 

JUST GO DO IT. STOP WASTING TIME!!

I know this post may be a little too RAW and unfiltered. People don’t like to hear what’s real. I get it. But I can’t be any other way. I rather hear it straight. Don’t sugar coat nothing 🫡🙏🏽

#livelife #happiness #healthy #traveling lifestyle

caption.text:
1: Having discipline in one area of your life will greatly increase the chances of having discipline in other areas of your life! 

2. Having discipline will help you value and protect your time. Which you can’t get back. 

3. Discipline shows character and integrity and is respected. 

4. Your children, family, friends, colleagues etc will be motivated and inspire to develop the discipline you demonstrate. 

Took my talents to the streets of New York City during a blizzard ❄️

What you value most is up to you. Your choice! 🫡

#fitlife #motivation #runner #newyork #lifestyle

caption.text:
I’m in this for the long haul. 
I’m aware it won’t happen overnight. 
Days/Nights in the gym. 
Eating quality food even when I’m not hungry. 
Choosing healthier options over sweets. 
Missing outings to get rest and sleep. 
Choosing stretching and recovery over weights. 
All of the above 🫡

#ﬁtnessmotivation #barberlife #lifestyle #running #gymlife

caption.text:
Life hurts sometimes. 
You’ll get knocked down sometimes. 
You’ll be confused sometimes. 
You will make a mistake more than once. 
It happens. 
But don’t sit there and wine and complain about it.
Do something about it. 
For me I started running! 🏃🏾‍♂️ 

#runnersofinstagram 
#barber 
#running 
#fitnessmotivation 
#lifestyle

Super Bowl is over. Back to the regular scheduled program 💪🏾🫡

caption.text:
Bro I guarantee you’re not stretching and strengthening your hips, and we wonder why our low back hurts, core is weak, stiff muscles, very little mobility 🤷🏾‍♂️

I know cause I WAS that guy. Figure I just lift weights all day long and wok have any problems. Whole time could barely move without hurting or tweaking something. Yeah I’m done with that. 

#barber #fitnessjourney #mobility #hipmobility

music_asset_info.title: PIECES ON MY NECK. FT. 21 SAVAGE.

caption.text:
I am so SORRY to my future self! 

From partying, poor habits and bad decisions to discipline, faith, and purpose. I stopped killing myself slowly and started choosing growth. The old me had to go. This is just the beginning. 🫡💪🏾

I challenge you to choose yourself ❤️

#inspiration #barber #lifestyle #loveyourself blessed

caption.text:
I’m so locked in, my comfort zone filed a missing person report! 🫡😤

Keep showing up for yourself my good people! 

Running is a lifestyle. 🏃🏾‍♂️

📍Downtown Raleigh 

#lifestyle #barber #howtoexercise #fitnessmotivation #runnerscommunity

original_sound_info.original_audio_title: Mix: The Diplomats • I Really Mean It (feat. Cam'Ron, Jimmy Jones)

caption.text:
I pray that you truly do not believe that it’s ok to just completely kill all your progress and the work you’ve put in this year just because you’re stuck in the house ❄️❄️

Please tell me you’ve built up more discipline than that, tell me you care more about yourself than that. 

Fight harder my good people. Submit to yourself and lock in 🫡💪🏾

#fitnessmotivation #barber #healthylifestyle #loveyourself

caption.text:
How many times did I say “Yessir”?????? 🤔

Being booked and busy is a blessing and a testament to the ability to retain relationships! 
Keep grinding barbers, shop owners and stylists worldwide 🫡

📍Raleigh NC

caption.text:
Idk it just became a thing. 🏃🏾‍♂️

I truly believe if you can lock in and become disciplined in one aspect of your life, then you will naturally become more motivated and disciplined in all other areas of your life. 

Take that how you may. 

@raleighgov is such a beautiful city 🌃

@strava keeps me on track for my entire run. 🏃🏾‍♂️🔥🔥

Let’s continue to stay active and love one another ✌🏾🫡

#runner #barberlife #lifestyle #focused #explorer
